name: Six Feet Under with The Undertaker
original_name: Six Feet Under with The Undertaker
overview: Join The Undertaker as he talks shop with wrestlers, legends and celebrities. He’ll also take you behind the scenes of his career with stories he’s never told before and share his honest commentary on the current WWE scene. Brand-new episodes drop every other Thursday on YouTube and wherever you get your podcasts. Six Feet Under With The Undertaker is brought to you by Fanatics.
